title: Kannapolis Schools Cancel Classes for Staff Rally on Pay
summary: Kannapolis City Schools cancels classes May 1 for a staff rally demanding increased public education funding.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate and advocacy for better teacher compensation and public education investment.

title: Fatal Shooting at Concord Park Leaves One Dead, One Injured
summary: A shooting at Hartsell Park in Concord resulted in one death and one injury in the parking lot area.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and potential violence in community spaces.

title: Crews Make Progress Containing Avery County Wildfire
summary: The N.C. Forest Service reports the large wildfire in Avery County is 75% contained.
charlotte_impact: Indicates progress in controlling the wildfire, reducing the threat to the environment and local communities.

title: Mecklenburg County Deputy Fired After Domestic Violence Arrest
summary: Deputy Francisco Ramos was fired after being arrested for allegedly assaulting his wife. Sheriff has zero tolerance.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the serious consequences of domestic violence and the department's stance against it.

title: Investigation Underway After 'Incident' in Business Center
summary: Investigators are looking into an unspecified 'incident' that occurred in a business center parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Details are scarce, but it signals potential disruption or concern within the business community.

title: Data Center Debate Moves to Salisbury Amid Public Concerns
summary: A data center proposal in Salisbury sparks debate following protests against a similar project in Rowan County.
charlotte_impact: Reflects growing community concerns about the impact of data centers on local resources and environment.

title: Hickory Man Wins $100,000 from Losing Scratch-Off Ticket
summary: A Hickory man turned a losing scratch-off ticket into a $100,000 prize through a second-chance drawing.
charlotte_impact: A feel-good story highlighting the possibility of unexpected luck and rewards.

title: Arrest Made in 1993 Rape Case of Charlotte Woman
summary: An arrest has been made in the 1993 rape of a 79-year-old Charlotte woman, thanks to DNA analysis.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the power of forensic technology in solving cold cases and bringing justice to victims.

title: Motorcyclist Dies from Crash Injuries in Charlotte
summary: A motorcyclist died from injuries sustained in a collision in the University City area on April 19.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by motorcyclists and the importance of road safety.

title: Viral Delivery Driver Inspires Domino's, Coca-Cola Promo
summary: Domino's and Coca-Cola launch a nationwide promo honoring a viral Idaho delivery driver.
charlotte_impact: Shows how a local act of kindness can gain national recognition and inspire corporate promotions.

title: Rep. Alma Adams Investigated for Alleged Relationship
summary: Rep. Alma Adams was investigated for an alleged inappropriate relationship with a staffer in 2023 but was cleared.
charlotte_impact: Addresses ethical concerns in politics and the importance of accountability, even when cleared.

title: Hot, Dry Weather Expected Until Weekend Rain
summary: The forecast predicts hot and dry conditions until Saturday, with chances of rain this weekend and next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides essential weather information for planning and awareness of potential changes.

title: CATS Seeks Input on Silver Line Changes
summary: CATS is seeking public input on potential cost-cutting changes to the Silver Line project during a virtual meeting.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing development of public transportation and the opportunity for community involvement.

title: Suspect Arrested in Deadly Rock Hill Shooting
summary: D'Aaron Boyd Colston, 30, is arrested and charged with murder in connection to the shooting death of Brandon Swilling.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious crime and the efforts to bring justice to the victim and their family.

title: Man Killed in Lawn Mower Collision in Lincolnton
summary: A 63-year-old man died in Lincolnton when his riding lawn mower was struck by a pickup truck.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the dangers of operating lawn equipment near roadways.
